mapper.select:
SELECT /* getReportList */ A.REPORT_NUMB , A.USER_NUMB , A.BOOK_NUMB , A.REPORT_STAT , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{codeReadStat}, A.REPORT_STAT) AS REPORT_STAT_NAME , A.REPORT_STDT , A.REPORT_ENDT , A.REPORT_GRDE , A.REPORT_COLR , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{codeBookColr}, A.REPORT_COLR) AS REPORT_COLR_NAME , A.PUBC_YSNO , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{codeCommYsno}, A.PUBC_YSNO, #{optPubcYsno}) AS PUBC_YSNO_NAME , A.REPORT_CNTN , B.BOOK_TITL , B.BOOK_CVIM , CASE WHEN A.REPORT_STAT = #{reportStat} THEN #{commYes} ELSE #{commNo} END AS READING_YN FROM TM_BOOK_REPORT A LEFT JOIN TM_BOOK_INFO B ON A.BOOK_NUMB = B.BOOK_NUMB WHERE A.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb}
AND ( LOWER(B.BOOK_TITL) LIKE LOWER(#{bookKeywordLike}) OR LOWER(B.BOOK_ATHR) LIKE LOWER(#{bookKeywordLike}) )
ORDER BY A.REPORT_STDT DESC, A.REPORT_NUMB DESC
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(A.REPORT_GRDE) DESC, A.REPORT_ENDT DESC, A.REPORT_NUMB DESC
ORDER BY A.REPORT_ENDT DESC, A.REPORT_NUMB DESC

SELECT /* getReportCntByPeriod */ COUNT(*) FROM TM_BOOK_REPORT A WHERE A.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} AND A.REPORT_STAT = #{reportStat} AND TO_DATE(A.REPORT_ENDT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') >= TO_DATE(#{periodStart}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(A.REPORT_ENDT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') < TO_DATE(#{periodEndExclusive}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT /* getSummaryReportList */ A.REPORT_NUMB , A.USER_NUMB , A.BOOK_NUMB , A.REPORT_STAT , A.REPORT_STDT , A.REPORT_ENDT , A.REPORT_GRDE , A.PUBC_YSNO , REGEXP_REPLACE(B.BOOK_TITL, '[[:space:]]*\([^)]*\)[[:space:]]*$', '') AS BOOK_TITL , B.BOOK_ATHR , B.BOOK_CVIM , B.BOOK_ISBN FROM TM_BOOK_REPORT A LEFT JOIN TM_BOOK_INFO B ON A.BOOK_NUMB = B.BOOK_NUMB WHERE A.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} AND A.REPORT_STAT = #{reportStat}
AND TO_DATE(A.REPORT_ENDT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') >= TO_DATE(#{periodStart}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TO_DATE(A.REPORT_ENDT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') < TO_DATE(#{periodEndExclusive}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY TO_DATE(A.REPORT_ENDT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ASC, A.REPORT_NUMB DESC
ORDER BY TO_DATE(A.REPORT_ENDT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') DESC, A.REPORT_NUMB DESC
mapper.insert: /* setReadingGoal */ MERGE INTO TM_GOALXM G USING ( SELECT #{userNumb} AS USER_NUMB , #{goalDate} AS GOAL_DATE , #{goalType} AS GOAL_TYPE , #{goalCnt} AS GOAL_CNTT FROM DUAL ) S ON ( G.USER_NUMB = S.USER_NUMB AND G.GOAL_DATE = S.GOAL_DATE AND G.GOAL_TYPE = S.GOAL_TYPE ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET G.GOAL_CNTT = S.GOAL_CNTT , G.UPDT_CNTT = CASE WHEN S.GOAL_CNTT < G.GOAL_CNTT THEN NVL(G.UPDT_CNTT, 0) + 1 ELSE NVL(G.UPDT_CNTT, 0) END , G.UPDT_DATE = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( USER_NUMB , GOAL_DATE , GOAL_TYPE , GOAL_CNTT , UPDT_CNTT , REGI_DATE , UPDT_DATE ) VALUES ( S.USER_NUMB , S.GOAL_DATE , S.GOAL_TYPE , S.GOAL_CNTT , 0 , SYSDATE , SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT /* getReadingGoalAchvCnt */ COUNT(*) FROM TM_GOALXM G LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.USER_NUMB ,
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.REPORT_ENDT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'IYYYIW')
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.REPORT_ENDT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYYMM')
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.REPORT_ENDT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY') || '00'
AS GOAL_DATE , COUNT(*) AS DONE_CNT FROM TM_BOOK_REPORT A WHERE A.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} AND A.REPORT_STAT = #{reportStat} AND A.REPORT_ENDT IS NOT NULL GROUP BY A.USER_NUMB ,
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.REPORT_ENDT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'IYYYIW')
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.REPORT_ENDT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYYMM')
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.REPORT_ENDT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY') || '00'
) R ON G.USER_NUMB = R.USER_NUMB AND G.GOAL_DATE = R.GOAL_DATE WHERE G.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} AND G.GOAL_TYPE = #{goalType} AND G.GOAL_CNTT > 0 AND NVL(R.DONE_CNT, 0) >= G.GOAL_CNTT

SELECT /* getReportDtl */ A.REPORT_NUMB , A.USER_NUMB , A.BOOK_NUMB , A.REPORT_STAT , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{codeReadStat}, A.REPORT_STAT) AS REPORT_STAT_NAME , A.REPORT_STDT , A.REPORT_ENDT , A.REPORT_GRDE , A.REPORT_COLR , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{codeBookColr}, A.REPORT_COLR) AS REPORT_COLR_NAME , A.PUBC_YSNO , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{codeCommYsno}, A.PUBC_YSNO, #{optPubcYsno}) AS PUBC_YSNO_NAME , A.REPORT_CNTN , NVL(LC.LIKE_CNT, 0) AS LIKE_CNT , NVL(UL.LIKE_YSNO, #{commNo}) AS LIKE_YSNO , B.BOOK_TITL , B.BOOK_ATHR , B.BOOK_CVIM , B.BOOK_ISBN , B.BOOK_PUBL , B.BOOK_DESC , FN_GET_LOCAL_DATE_STR(B.PUBL_DATE, #{locale}) AS PUBL_DATE , G.BOOK_AVG_GRDE FROM TM_BOOK_REPORT A LEFT JOIN TM_BOOK_INFO B ON A.BOOK_NUMB = B.BOOK_NUMB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT L.REPORT_NUMB , COUNT(*) AS LIKE_CNT FROM TB_RPLIKE L GROUP BY L.REPORT_NUMB ) LC ON A.REPORT_NUMB = LC.REPORT_NUMB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT L.REPORT_NUMB , #{commYes} AS LIKE_YSNO FROM TB_RPLIKE L WHERE L.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} ) UL ON A.REPORT_NUMB = UL.REPORT_NUMB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT P.BOOK_NUMB , ROUND(AVG(TO_NUMBER(P.REPORT_GRDE)), 1) AS BOOK_AVG_GRDE FROM TM_BOOK_REPORT P WHERE P.REPORT_STAT = #{reportStat} GROUP BY P.BOOK_NUMB ) G ON G.BOOK_NUMB = B.BOOK_NUMB WHERE A.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} AND A.REPORT_NUMB = #{reportNumb}

SELECT /* getPublicReportList */ P.REPORT_NUMB , P.USER_NUMB , U.USER_NICK , F.FILE_PATH AS PORF_PATH , P.BOOK_NUMB , P.REPORT_GRDE , P.REPORT_CNTN , P.PUBC_YSNO , NVL(LC.LIKE_CNT, 0) AS LIKE_CNT , NVL(UL.LIKE_YSNO, #{commNo}) AS LIKE_YSNO FROM TM_BOOK_INFO B INNER JOIN TM_BOOK_REPORT P ON B.BOOK_NUMB = P.BOOK_NUMB INNER JOIN TM_USERXM U ON P.USER_NUMB = U.USER_NUMB LEFT JOIN TM_FILEXM F ON U.PROF_NUMB = F.FILE_NUMB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT L.REPORT_NUMB , COUNT(*) AS LIKE_CNT FROM TB_RPLIKE L GROUP BY L.REPORT_NUMB ) LC ON LC.REPORT_NUMB = P.REPORT_NUMB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT L.REPORT_NUMB , #{commYes} AS LIKE_YSNO FROM TB_RPLIKE L WHERE L.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} ) UL ON UL.REPORT_NUMB = P.REPORT_NUMB WHERE P.USER_NUMB != #{userNumb} AND P.PUBC_YSNO = #{commYes} AND B.BOOK_ISBN = #{bookIsbn} ORDER BY P.REPORT_NUMB DESC

SELECT /* getReportLikeDtl */ R.REPORT_NUMB , NVL(LC.LIKE_CNT, 0) AS LIKE_CNT , NVL(UL.LIKE_YSNO, #{commNo}) AS LIKE_YSNO FROM ( SELECT #{reportNumb} AS REPORT_NUMB FROM DUAL ) R LEFT JOIN ( SELECT L.REPORT_NUMB , COUNT(*) AS LIKE_CNT FROM TB_RPLIKE L WHERE L.REPORT_NUMB = #{reportNumb} GROUP BY L.REPORT_NUMB ) LC ON LC.REPORT_NUMB = R.REPORT_NUMB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT L.REPORT_NUMB , #{commYes} AS LIKE_YSNO FROM TB_RPLIKE L WHERE L.REPORT_NUMB = #{reportNumb} AND L.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} ) UL ON UL.REPORT_NUMB = R.REPORT_NUMB
